If authentic, the exposure of SMS logs and messaging metadata could enable highly targeted phishing campaigns, social engineering, and fraud by revealing customer communications and transaction-related notifications.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Morocco

🇰🇷 South Korea | SK Telecom Subscriber Dataset with ~21M Records Allegedly Offered for Sale  A threat actor claims to be selling a dataset associated with SK Telecom containing approximately 21 million subscriber records.  * According to the listing, the dataset allegedly includes:   * Customer identifiers   * Full names   * Dates of birth   * Email addresses   * Mobile subscriber numbers (MSISDN)   * IMSI subscriber identity information   * SIM and subscriber management data   * Service plan details   * Device and connection information   * Payment method information   * Usage and account metrics   * Roaming information   * Account status and balance data   * Value-added service records  * The seller advertises the dataset as customer account and subscriber information originating from South Korea's largest telecommunications provider.  Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. If authentic, a dataset of this scale containing subscriber and telecommunications metadata could significantly increase the risk of SIM-swapping, identity theft, targeted phishing, and telecom-focused fraud. Organizations relying on SMS-based authentication should encourage stronger phishing-resistant MFA methods where possible.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #SouthKorea

🇦🇺 Australia | Australian Personal Data Database Allegedly Offered for Sale  A threat actor claims to be selling a database containing 438,522 records of Australian individuals.  * According to the listing, the dataset allegedly includes:   * First and last names   * Full names   * Gender   * Email addresses   * Dates of birth   * Phone numbers   * Street addresses   * Cities   * ZIP/postal codes  * The seller states the database is provided in CSV format and includes sample records as proof of the listing.  Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. If authentic, the exposed combination of contact details, dates of birth, and physical addresses could significantly increase the risk of identity theft, phishing, SIM-swapping, and other social engineering attacks targeting Australian residents.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Australia

🇪🇸 Spain | Leroy Merlin Spain Database Allegedly Released  A threat actor claims to have released a database associated with Leroy Merlin Spain (leroymerlin.es).  * According to the forum post, the dataset allegedly contains:   * 54,723 records   * Customer-related database information   * Sample records shared as proof of the listing  * The dataset has reportedly been published on a hacking forum and promoted via the actor's Telegram channel.  Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. Even relatively small customer databases can be leveraged for phishing, credential stuffing, and social engineering attacks. Organizations should validate the authenticity of the dataset, monitor for secondary distribution, and notify affected users if necessary.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Spain

If you've seen a bunch of posts from my account recently I'm dealing with a Twitter iOS bug with formatting, sorry.
Who at Microsoft decided the Start Menu wasn't the FIRST user element to load?
Next time someone at work says "which loser should we assign to implement DLP"

In 2017 I left a job, and within a week one of my former employees shut down and physically threw away a system I had set up for some QOL improvements for employees. It was very clearly documented (I've written technical documentation books).  It was a dashboard that showed traffic around the office, weather, if there was a ballgame at the ballpark literally next door (building parking got used for ball games), alerts from IT, live IT system statuses, and links to the ticket system, knowledge base, and employee handbook. It was accessible online or by looking at it on a display I put up on a wall for folks. People absolutely loved it.  My former number two literally took the display down and threw the physical server into the trash. A couple folks texted me asking why I took it down before I left, I said I didn't. They sent me a picture of it in the e-waste bin. I messaged him asking why, he said, he "always hated how transparent it was what we were working on."   He was not picked to be my replacement. The new guy who came in undid more things and then they got nailed in a $200k invoice scam and then he was fired. The company is gone now. :(
FYI driving over a sprinkler absolutely will fuck it up don't do that
Protip to bug hunters: Look for error conditions that throw strings/pages never designed for consumer consumption and lacking in localization.

llm_summary:
🤖 [GEMINI 분석] 2026-06-26 19:55 KST
🟠 위협 점수: 8/10 (높음)

### 1. 현재 주요 사이버보안 트렌드
최근 위협 환경은 AI 에이전트와 자동화된 공격 도구를 활용한 공급망 공격이 급증하고 있으며, 특히 오픈소스 패키지 및 AI 모델의 취약점을 악용하는 사례가 두드러집니다. 또한, 기존의 피싱 기법이 Node.js 임플란트나 RMM 도구 배포와 결합하여 더욱 정교해지고 있으며, 엣지 디바이스(FortiGate, Cisco SD-WAN 등)의 Zero-Day 취약점이 활발히 악용되고 있습니다. 방어 측면에서는 MITRE ATT&CK 프레임워크를 기반으로 한 탐지 엔지니어링과 AI를 활용한 위협 인텔리전스 분석이 필수적인 대응 전략으로 자리 잡고 있습니다.

### 2. 주요 위협 행위자 / 캠페인
*   **Turla**: 우크라이나 정부 및 군사 조직을 타겟으로 하는 .NET 기반의 신규 백도어 **STOCKSTAY**를 배포하며 첩보 활동 수행 (Google, SecurityWeek).
*   **Gamaredon**: FSB 배후의 위협 행위자로, C&C 인프라 은닉을 위해 합법적 온라인 서비스와 터널링 기술을 고도화하며 공격 전술을 업그레이드함 (DarkReading, WeLiveSecurity).
*   **The Gentlemen**: EDR Killer 프레임워크를 유지하며 랜섬웨어 공격을 수행하는 RaaS 그룹으로, 공격적인 인재 영입 전략을 구사함 (Krebs on Security, WeLiveSecurity).
*   **CL-STA-1062**: 동남아시아 정부 및 주요 인프라를 타겟으로 **TinyRCT** 백도어를 사용하는 하이브리드 툴킷 기반의 첩보 캠페인 수행 (Unit42).

### 3. 한국 관련 위협
*   **포세이돈(Poseidon)·토스(Toss)**: 사용자 참여형 AI 데이터 경제 모델 구축을 위한 파트너십 체결 (데일리시큐).
*   **AI 범죄 대응**: 딥페이크 및 AI 금융사기 대응을 위한 범부처 협의체 출범 (데일리시큐).
*   **북한 연계 위협**: Chai.js 플러그인 위장 악성 npm 패키지('chai-as-init') 및 김수키(Kimsuky)의 스피어 피싱 공격 지속 (이스트시큐리티 알약).

### 4. 주요 CVE / 취약점
*   **CVE-2026-48908**: Joomla SP Page Builder, CVSS 10.0, RCE 가능, 활발히 악용 중.
*   **CVE-2026-12569**: PTC Windchill, RCE 취약점, CISA KEV 목록 등재 및 야생(In-the-wild) 악용 확인.
*   **CVE-2026-7761**: WordPress ultimate-member 플러그인, CVSS 8.8, 공격 코드 존재.
*   **CVE-2026-20245**: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN, Zero-Day로 악용되어 root 권한 탈취 가능.
*   **CVE-2025-67038**: Lantronix EDS5000, 엣지 디바이스 대상 root 명령 실행 취약점, 활발히 악용 중.

### 5. IOC 요약
*   **CVE**:
    *   CVE-2026-12569 ([SecurityWeek](https://www.securityweek.com/first-ever-exploitation-of-ptc-windchill-vulnerability-discovered-in-the-wild/))
    *   CVE-2026-48908 ([Censys](https://twitter.com/censysio/status/2069808747484963270))
    *   CVE-2026-20245 ([ClearPhish](https://twitter.com/ClearPhish/status/2070450555127054800))
    *   CVE-2025-67038 ([TheHackerNews](https://twitter.com/TheHackersNews/status/2070397398044876871))

### 6. 즉각 대응 권고
*   **엣지 디바이스 패치**: FortiGate, Cisco SD-WAN, Lantronix EDS5000 등 네트워크 엣지 장비의 최신 보안 패치 적용 및 노출된 관리자 페이지 점검.
*   **공급망 보안 강화**: 개발 환경에서 사용하는 npm 패키지(특히 Chai.js 관련)의 무결성을 검증하고, 외부 라이브러리 도입 시 자동화된 스캔 프로세스 도입.
*   **피싱 대응**: 사진 테마의 ZIP 파일이나 'Parcel Expert' 등 채용 관련 사칭 메일에 대한 임직원 교육 및 첨부파일 실행 차단 정책 강화.

### 7. 위협 수준 평가
*   **점수**: 8/10
*   **근거**: 엣지 디바이스 대상 Zero-Day 악용이 빈번하고, 국가 배후의 APT 그룹들이 우크라이나 및 동남아시아 인프라를 지속적으로 타겟팅하고 있어 전 세계적인 보안 위협 수위가 높음.

📊 Gemini 토큰: 이번 14,387개 (입력 13,144 / 출력 1,243)
